body.title: Wire CriticDevice into DickSimnel ToolLoop
body.result: CriticDevice wired into ToolLoop: evaluate_decision per tool call + advisory apply_rules + learn+save at sprint end; 9 tests; all fail-open
body.intention: I intend that every tool call DickSimnel makes is evaluated by CriticAgent, so the planner-executor-critic loop is closed and the builder can learn from its own decisions.
body.description:
CriticDevice (devices/critic/) already exists with evaluate_decision(), analyze_pattern(), learn_from_patterns(), and apply_rules(). It is not wired into DickSimnel's execution loop. Every tool call DS makes goes unevaluated.

Wire CriticAgent into the DickSimnel ToolLoop:
1. After each tool call result, call critic_agent.evaluate_decision(Decision(ticket_id, turn_num, decision_point, choice, context, tool_result))
2. At sprint end (ticket close), call analyze_pattern(all_judgments) then learn_from_patterns(analysis)
3. Persist learned rules via CriticDevice._save_rules() to ~/.unseen_university/critic_rules/
4. At sprint start, call critic_agent.load_rules() so prior learning carries forward
5. During tool selection, call critic_agent.apply_rules(context) — if a rule fires, log its recommendation (advisory, not blocking for now)

The Critic runs in-process alongside the ToolLoop. It is advisory at first — log recommendations but do not block execution. This gives us a learning signal without risking execution failures from premature gating.

**Affected files:** devices/dicksimnel/toolloop.py (add CriticAgent calls), devices/critic/device.py (add _save_rules/_load_rules persistence), devices/critic/agent.py (minor: ensure load_rules handles missing file gracefully)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; log every Critic verdict at INFO; rules persisted to flat JSON (not Postgres — rules are local to the builder instance)
**Scope boundary:** In scope: wire CriticAgent into ToolLoop; persist/load rules; advisory recommendations logged. Out of scope: blocking execution on Critic verdict (follow-on), Simulator integration (T-simulator-execution-sandbox), LLM-powered Critic judgments (current impl is rule-based — upgrade is separate ticket).
**Completion criteria:** (1) After a DS sprint, ~/.unseen_university/critic_rules/*.json contains learned rules; (2) DS logs show CriticAgent verdict lines at INFO for each tool call; (3) apply_rules() logs a recommendation when a known failure pattern recurs; (4) all tests pass.
